arts.ttl: Kolo Muani Takes Juventus by Storm: Set to Start Against Napoli as Vlahovic Faces Bench
arts.sum: Randal Kolo Muani has made an immediate impact at Juventus since his arrival, impressing both in training and with his overall fitness. The French striker, who joined the Bianconeri on loan from Paris Saint-Germain, is poised to make his debut in the crucial away match against league leaders Napoli. arts.ttl: Juventus attempts to tempt Tottenham, Crystal Palace and Fulham into €20m deal don’t appear to work
arts.sum: Juventus’ attempts to tempt Tottenham, Crystal Palace and Fulham into a €20m move for Nicolò Fagioli appear to have failed. That’s according to Corriere dello Sport, who report that Juventus’ attempts to drum up interest in the midfielder in England have so far failed.
